phrases.intent_en: How long to see the sculptural reliefs?
phrases.text_local: Heykel kabartmalarını görmek ne kadar sürer?
phrases.cultural_note: Viewing duration is unverified; staff can provide a realistic estimate.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Artemisia burial chamber?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct path to the burial chamber is unverified; asking staff is standard.

likely_response.local: Oda yok, tüm kalıntılar aynı alanda.
likely_response.translation_en: There is no chamber, all the remains are in the same area.

responses.english: There is no chamber, all the remains are in the same area.
responses.french: Oda yok, tüm kalıntılar aynı alanda.

phrases.intent_en: Can I climb on the ancient stones?
phrases.cultural_note: Climbing is strictly prohibited to protect the fragile ruins.

likely_response.translation_en: No, climbing on ancient stones is forbidden.

responses.english: No, climbing on ancient stones is forbidden.

phrases.intent_en: How long to see the sculptural reliefs?
phrases.cultural_note: Safety prefix used because viewing duration is not specified in the venue context.

phrases.intent_en: Can I climb on the ancient stones?
phrases.cultural_note: Response based on the venue context rule: 'No climbing on ancient stones'.

likely_response.translation_en: No, climbing on the ancient stones is forbidden.

responses.english: No, climbing on the ancient stones is forbidden.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the gift shop after exit?
phrases.text_local: Çıkıştan sonra hediyelik eşya dükkanı nerede?
phrases.cultural_note: The gift shop's exact location is unverified; staff will direct you.

likely_response.translation_en: At the exit, immediately on the right.

responses.english: At the exit, immediately on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Is Museum Pass Turkey accepted here?
phrases.text_local: Müze Kart Türkiye burada geçerli mi?
phrases.cultural_note: Museum Pass acceptance is unverified; confirming with staff is safest.
